data.title: CZ AMA: Prediction Market Sector's Newness and Its Fewer Market Makers
data.description: In a livestream AMA on Binance Square, CZ commented on pr4ediction markets—he stated that prediction markets have fewer market makers as the sector is still a new one. He expressed that to his knowledge, prediction markets such as Polymarket only have one or two market makers, and the sector in general is still concentrated on sports events.

data.title: CleanSpark Expands Data Center Projects with Texas Land Acquisition
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Bitcoin mining company CleanSpark, listed on Nasdaq, has announced the signing of an agreement to acquire 447 acres of land in Brazoria County, Texas. The company has also reached a long-term agreement with a power company to extend transmission facilities. This initiative aims to support the development of a large-scale data center project to meet a demand of 300 MW, with the potential to expand to 600 MW. The transaction is expected to be completed in the first quarter of 2026, pending utility and property-related approvals.

This acquisition marks CleanSpark's second strategic development project in the greater Houston area under ERCOT, with the first being in Austin County. The company is establishing a regional power and infrastructure hub exceeding 890 MW. These locations are designed to support the development of large, next-generation data center campuses to handle artificial intelligence and high-performance computing workloads.

data.title: Indian Authorities Freeze Assets in $3.2 Million Fraud Case
data.description: According to Odaily, the Indian Enforcement Directorate has frozen assets worth $1.3 million, including cryptocurrency holdings, in connection with a $3.2 million fraud case.

data.title: Former Chinese Securities Official Allegedly Involved in ICO Scandal
data.description:
According to Foresight News, a report from CCTV reveals that Yao Qian, the former director of the Technology Supervision Department of the China Securities Regulatory Commission and former director of the Information Center, was implicated in an ICO-related scandal in 2018. Yao reportedly intervened on behalf of a businessman named Zhang, who was conducting an ICO that raised 20,000 ETH. As a token of appreciation, Zhang allegedly transferred 2,000 ETH to Yao.

Investigators discovered a hardware wallet in Yao's office drawer. Additionally, several bank accounts opened by others were found to be shell accounts linked to Yao. One of these accounts received a 10 million yuan transfer, which was traced through multiple layers to a virtual currency trader's account. The funds were ultimately used to purchase a villa in Beijing.

data.description:
Bitpanda has reportedly tapped Goldman Sachs, Citigroup, and Deutsche Bank to work on the offering, planned for Frankfurt’s stock exchange.

data.title: CZ AMA: Genuine Meme Coins Should Have Historical and Referential Significance
data.description: In an AMA livestream on Binance Square, Binance co-founder and former CEO, CZ, stated that he believes genuine meme coin projects should have historical significance and a memorable story. However, he expressed that only a very small number of meme coin projects truly have value, with a failure rate exceeding 90%. Early investors in meme coin projects face certain risks that they should be aware of, and investors in general need to be responsible for their own choices.

data.title: CZ AMA: Bitcoin Will Definitely Reach $200,000, The Only Question Is When
data.description: In a AMA livestream on Binance Square, Binance co-founder and former CEO, CZ, stated it is only a matter of time before Bitcoin reaches $200,000. He stated that although he is not sure when, he is sure that it will happen.

data.title: Tether CEO: WDK continues to expand, now supporting the RGB protocol.
data.description: Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino stated in an article on the X platform that Tether's Wallet Development Kit (WDK) is continuously expanding and now supports the RGB protocol.

data.title: CZ: I personally hold a "significant" amount of BNB, and the BNB ecosystem is relatively stable.
data.description: During a live AMA on Binance Square, CZ stated that he personally holds a significant amount of BNB. He noted that the BNB ecosystem is currently quite stable, with many contributors and a very active community.

data.title: South Korea AI champions caught using Chinese code amid $6.9B ‘sovereign AI’ outlay
data.description:
A South Korean government effort to develop a nationally independent artificial intelligence system has run into trouble after more than half the finalists were discovered using foreign technology in their submissions. South Korea is placing an enormous wager on artificial intelligence. Parliament approved a massive 727. 9 trillion won ($495. 8 billion) budget for 2026, with President […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/south-korea-using-chinese-code-sovereign-ai/

data.title: CZ AMA: Hope for Meme Coins to Rise in Popularity
data.description: In an AMA livestream on Binance Square, Binance co-founder and former CEO, CZ, stated that he no longer has to rely on meme coins to "get rich overnight", but he hopes for memecoins to continue to rise in popularity. He stated that from the perspective of a builder, he hopes to build better and smoother tools.

data.title: CZ AMA Live: Crypto Trading on Binance Square Versus X
data.description: In an AMA livestream on Binance Square, Binance co-founder and former CEO, CZ, stated that the "fundamentals" of social media platforms like X and Binance Square are different. Regarding the issue of whether X will open up cryptocurrency trading, CZ expressed doubts on whether Know-Your-Client (KYC) will be conducted, and he expressed that most Binance Square users have gone through KYC.

data.title: Spanish bank Bankinter disclosed that it has acquired a minority stake in cryptocurrency exchange Bit2Me.
data.description: Spanish bank Bankinter disclosed that it has acquired a minority stake in Spanish cryptocurrency exchange Bit2Me. Bankinter stated that this $34 million funding round is significant for European cryptocurrency exchanges, and the investment aims to "achieve technological and knowledge synergies" while supporting Bit2Me's fintech expansion in Spain and the EU. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Trump urged the Supreme Court: "Before any major rulings, look at our unprecedented economic success."
data.description: Trump stated that data released today shows the U.S. trade deficit has fallen to its lowest level since 2009 and is continuing to decline. Furthermore, our nation's GDP growth is projected to exceed 5%, after suffering at least a 1.5% loss due to the Democratic shutdown. These astonishing figures, and our nation's unprecedented success, are a direct result of tariff policy, which has saved our economy and national security. I hope the Supreme Court will understand these historic, nation-saving achievements before making its most important (and by far most important) ruling. (Jin Shi)

data.title: Bankinter joins $34M Bit2Me investment for EU fintech expansion
data.description:
Bankinter joined stablecoin giant Tether in the $34 million investment round, seeking to bolster the Spanish crypto exchange’s European expansion after receiving its MiCa license in 2025.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bankinter-30m-bit2me-investment-eu-fintech-expansion?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Tether Expands Wallet Development Kit with RGB Protocol Support
data.description: According to Foresight News, Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino announced via a tweet that the company's Wallet Development Kit (WDK) is undergoing continuous expansion and now includes support for the RGB protocol.

data.title: USD/JPY Experiences Short-Term Decline
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, the USD/JPY currency pair experienced a short-term drop of 50 points, reaching a low of 158.19.

data.title: CZ: I no longer need to get rich quick through Meme coin investment, but I still hope Meme coin becomes more and more popular.
data.description: During his AMA livestream on Binance Square, CZ stated that he no longer needs to invest 1,000 yuan to make ten times his initial investment overnight or get rich quick through Meme coin investment. This has lost much meaning for him. He personally hopes that Meme coin will become more and more popular, and from the perspective of a builder, he hopes to create better and smoother tools.

data.description: Market data shows that RIVER briefly broke through 27 USDT and is currently trading at 27.57 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of nearly 40%.
